text: Expose a complete review and reconciliation boundary before any durable financial mutation.
target: Every source record is accounted for exactly once. A transaction-bearing record must be accepted, proven an exact duplicate, or blocked; any rejected or ambiguous transaction-bearing record keeps the batch uncommittable, while non-transaction records may be excluded with a stable reason. Candidate counts and available exact source controls reconcile. Evidence: direct — the accepted preview-before-mutation boundary plus UC-INGEST-001/002.
